articles.description: Jose Mourinho is in final negotiations to become Real Madrid's next head coach, 13 years after his first spell at the Bernabeu.
articles.title: Real Madrid: Jose Mourinho in final negotiations to become next head coach

articles.description: Disallowing West Ham's last-ditch equaliser against Arsenal on Sunday was the right decision, referees' chief Howard Webb says.
articles.title: Arsenal v West Ham disallowed goal: Referee made right decision - Howard Webb

articles.description: Memphis Grizzlies forward Brandon Clarke dies at the age of 29, the NBA team confirms.
articles.title: Brandon Clarke: Memphis Grizzlies forward dies at the age of 29

articles.description: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola says his players have to play well enough to ensure VAR does not decide the outcome of their games, comparing the system to a "flip of a coin".
articles.title: VAR is 'flip of coin', says Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola

articles.description: Rory McIlroy is a different man compared with the tetchy figure who shunned the media for much of last year's PGA Championship, writes Iain Carter.
articles.title: Relaxed and ripping off toenails - McIlroy's unusual US PGA preparation

articles.description: Real Madrid president Florentino Perez stages a tense press conference in which he argues with journalists and calls for elections off the back of a trophyless season.
articles.title: Real Madrid: President Florentino Perez calls for elections in tense press conference

articles.description: Follow live text commentary, score updates and match stats from Southampton vs Middlesbrough in the second leg of the Championship play-off semi-finals.
articles.title: Southampton vs Middlesbrough LIVE: Championship live text commentary, stats & head-to-head

articles.description: Manchester United's former Real Madrid midfielder Casemiro says Cristiano Ronaldo is the greatest footballer he has played with - but that Gareth Bale is the "most complete".
articles.title: Gareth Bale more 'complete' than Cristiano Ronaldo - Manchester United's Casemiro

articles.description: Lionel Messi remains the highest-paid player in Major League Soccer with an annual base salary of $25m (£18.5m) - more than double that of the North American league's next-highest earner.
articles.title: Inter Miami's Lionel Messi remains highest-paid MLS player with salary of £18.5m

articles.description: Two-time major winner Jon Rahm says his job is to play golf, not try to fix businesses as he shifts his focus from LIV Golf to this week's US PGA Championship.
articles.title: Jon Rahm: LIV Golf chiefs responsible for 'fixing' breakaway circuit
